title: Mizuno's | Tinker Edition
description: A lightweight addon that provides texture compatibility and patch fixes for Mizuno's 16 Craft MC version 1.20.5-1.21.11
body:
![Mounts of Mayhem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3fea00d8cad4757c267e1d2793127a47833e38e_0.webp)<center>Tinkering with textures.</center>

---
The purpose of this _unnoficial patch_ for Mizuno's 16 Craft, is to bridge the gap for the missing textures in the recent Minecraft versions.

This pack is meant to be accompanied with [**Modern Mizuno's**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-mizunos), as it also covers textures that are currently missing in such resource pack

Please be patient if it takes a while to fix a bug for more recent versions.

---

> **Required Resource Pack**
> 
> - In order for the pack to function properly please download the original Mizuno's 16 Craft from this distribution page:\
> [https://www.mediafire.com/file/42pqrtiwkmali5j/Mizuno%2527s_16_Craft_JE_1.20.4-1.0_230105.zip/file](https://www.mediafire.com/file/42pqrtiwkmali5j/Mizuno%2527s_16_Craft_JE_1.20.4-1.0_230105.zip/file)
> 
---
## Load Order

**Intended load order for the changes to take effect:**

1. **Mizuno's 16 Craft**
2. **Tinker Edition**
3. **Modern Mizuno's** _(required starting from version 1.21.4)_


> **Notice:**
> 
> - **Make sure that the addon is placed above Mizuno**
---

---
_Textures were emulated from the Bedrock Edition of the pack_
